understanding.goal_understanding: The goal is to reach the goal gem tile marked '+' by navigating the grid, using horizontal moves and gravity, while avoiding spike hazards and managing a limited turn budget per attempt.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: The player moves horizontally (MOVE_LEFT/MOVE_RIGHT), after which gravity pulls the character down until landing on a solid tile or hitting a hazard. CLICK removes breakable blocks ('x') at specified coordinates to open fall paths. UNDO reverts the last action. Spikes ('u','v') cause immediate failure. The player has 50 turns per attempt and 2 attempts per level. Corridor scans show landing positions for each column, and passages indicate new vertical sections. Click actions do not advance the rising platform timer, unlike horizontal moves.

Agent explained goal and mechanics.

understanding.goal_understanding: The goal is to reach the goal gem tile marked '+' by navigating the grid, using horizontal moves and gravity, while avoiding spike hazards and managing a limited turn budget per attempt.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: The player moves horizontally (MOVE_LEFT/MOVE_RIGHT), after which gravity pulls the character down until landing on a solid tile or hitting a hazard. CLICK removes breakable blocks ('x') at specified coordinates to open fall paths. UNDO reverts the last action. Spikes ('u','v') cause immediate failure. The player has 50 turns per attempt and 2 attempts per level. Corridor scans show landing positions for each column, and passages indicate new vertical sections. Click actions do not advance the rising platform timer, unlike horizontal moves.
